title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Prem Intel Ltd
body: "Application number 5419  Applicant Intel Corporation objected to the name used by Prem Intel Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 27 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Prem Intel Ltd is changed to 16232801, Ltd. "
